title: IMMZD18SPolioSequentialIPVbOPV ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZD18SPolioSequentialIPVbOPV ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

First IPV dose from the primary series w.en: First IPV dose from the primary series was administered

Second IPV dose from the primary series.en: Second IPV dose from the primary series was administered

First bOPV dose from the primary series.en: First bOPV dose from the primary series was administered

Second bOPV dose from the primary series.en: Second bOPV dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
